message1_tldr:
Kirsten sold 37 bars at $10 each — 20 Oscar 2024 and 17 Santa Ana 2023 — processed via a batch Stripe script Gary wrote and submitted to Edgar. That's $370 in confirmed cash sales recorded on-chain.

- **37 bars sold, fully recorded** — Elizabeth Wong's bulk Stripe checkout decoded into 37 serialised QR codes (20 Oscar 2024 + 17 Santa Ana 2023); `submit_elizabeth_wong_sales.py` batch-submitted all 37 `[SALES EVENT]` entries to Edgar with amortised fees.
- **Async `[STORE ADD EVENT]` scanner shipped** — new GAS scanner processes store-add chat events without blocking; schema bug in Agroverse Partners columns B–H corrected against the live sheet.
- **Inventory Holdings by Manager view live** — coordinators can now see stock broken out by manager directly in the DApp; page is mobile-friendly.
- **Hit List gains "Deferred / Revisit Later" status** — available across Nearby, By-Status, and History views so coordinators can park venues without losing them.
- **Governor Chat moved to top of nav** — mobile layout fixed (responsive logo, `dvh` viewport, pinned input, touch targets); chat now accessible in one tap.
- **Store History field-reports timeline live** — optional Edgar attachments surfacing alongside visit history in the DApp.
- **Email agent open/click tracking columns added** — drafts now surface open and click-through data; visible Agroverse logo tracker included in HTML drafts.
- **Store History depth buckets shipped** — eight AU/AV depth buckets and list filters added to the Store History API; warmup/followup bucket pass-through fixed.
- **`outreach_visibility` metric added** to weekly JSON output so pipeline health is visible at a glance.
- **Circle-hosting detector hypothesis validated** — Gary logged the pattern: circle-hosting venues (sound bath, breathwork, etc.) correlate strongly with successful cacao partnerships; Way Home Shop confirmed match, Lumin Earth gap noted.
message2_shipped:
Shipped

- Store History field-reports timeline + optional Edgar attachments — https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/181
- Email agent open/click tracking columns + visible logo tracker in HTML drafts — https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/244 · https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/245
- Store History API: eight AU/AV depth buckets + list filters; warmup/followup bucket pass-through fix — https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/241 · https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/commit/2a9f729
- `outreach_visibility` metric added to weekly JSON; GAS field-report row normalisation fix — https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/240 · https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/commit/3065561
- Schema: States col Z (Partner Type) + Agroverse Partners table documented — https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/249

Community (Telegram log):

- Kirsten — 37 bars sold at $10 each (20 × Oscar 2024, 17 × Santa Ana 2023) via Elizabeth Wong bulk Stripe checkout; Gary wrote and executed `submit_elizabeth_wong_sales.py` to batch-submit all 37 `[SALES EVENT]` entries to Edgar with amortised fees; 45 min, Full Provision Awarded.
- Gary — Noted that circle-hosting venues (sound bath, breathwork, etc.) correlate strongly with successful partnerships; Way Home Shop matched, Lumin Earth gap (circles on IG only) acknowledged; circle-hosting detector end-to-end shipped (PR #92, 14-pattern crawler); 50 min total, Full Provision Awarded.
- Gary — `optimize_mobile_responsive.py` upstream generator bugs fixed + residual sweep across 100+ pages; 30 min, Full Provision Awarded.
